# Pixza Studio

> Pixza Studio is an AI-powered creative platform for image, video, audio, and 3D generation. Built for creators, designers, and businesses. Subscription-based with a free tier starting at ₹0/month.

## Pages

- [Home](https://pixzastudio.com/): Landing page with features, pricing, and demos
- [About](https://pixzastudio.com/about): Our story, mission, and values
- [Create](https://pixzastudio.com/create): Simple AI generation — text to image, video, audio, 3D
- [Studio](https://pixzastudio.com/studio): Visual node canvas for multi-step AI pipelines
- [Examples](https://pixzastudio.com/examples): Community-generated examples with prompts
- [Blog](https://pixzastudio.com/blog): AI tutorials, model comparisons, workflow guides
- [Contact](https://pixzastudio.com/contact): Get in touch
- [Waitlist](https://pixzastudio.com/waitlist): Join early access

## Tools

- [Tools Hub](https://pixzastudio.com/tools): All free AI tools
- [Background Remover](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/background-remover): Remove image backgrounds instantly — free
- [Magic Eraser](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/magic-eraser): Paint to erase objects, AI fills seamlessly — free
- [AI Background Generator](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/ai-background): Replace backgrounds with AI scenes — free
- [Object Remover](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/object-remover): Remove unwanted objects from photos — free
- [Image Upscaler](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/image-upscaler): Enhance and sharpen images — free
- [Batch Editor](https://pixzastudio.com/batch): Apply AI to 50 images at once — free

## Pricing

- Free: ₹0/month — 100 credits, Cloudflare free models, Gemini Flash Image
- Pro: ₹999/month — 3,000 credits, FLUX Dev, Imagen 4, Seedance video, no watermarks
- Agency: ₹2,999/month — 8,000 credits, Veo 3 Fast, everything in Pro, priority support

## AI Models

### Image (Free)
- FLUX.1 Schnell (Cloudflare)
- FLUX.2 Klein 4B/9B (Cloudflare)
- FLUX.2 Dev with image-to-image (Cloudflare)
- SDXL, SDXL Lightning, DreamShaper (Cloudflare)
- Gemini Flash Image (Google)

### Image (Pro)
- FLUX Dev Ultra Fast (WaveSpeed)
- Imagen 3 / Imagen 4 (Google)

### Video (Pro)
- Wan 2.1 Fast (WaveSpeed)
- Seedance 1.5 Lite/Pro (WaveSpeed)

### Video (Agency)
- Seedance 2.0 (WaveSpeed)
- Veo 3 Fast (KIE.ai)
- Veo 2 / Veo 3 (Google)

## Technical

- Framework: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Auth: WordPress JWT
- Payments: Razorpay (INR)
- AI: Cloudflare Workers AI, Google Gemini, WaveSpeed, KIE.ai
- Deployment: Vercel

- [Sitemap](https://pixzastudio.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Privacy Policy](https://pixzastudio.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://pixzastudio.com/terms)
